mapper.select: SELECT mr.*, d.drug_name, mp.time_slot as plan_time_slot FROM medication_record mr LEFT JOIN drug d ON mr.drug_id = d.id LEFT JOIN medication_plan mp ON mr.plan_id = mp.id WHERE mr.user_id = #{userId} AND mr.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY mr.record_date DESC, mr.scheduled_time DESC

SELECT mr.*, d.drug_name, mp.time_slot as plan_time_slot FROM medication_record mr LEFT JOIN drug d ON mr.drug_id = d.id LEFT JOIN medication_plan mp ON mr.plan_id = mp.id WHERE mr.user_id = #{userId} AND mr.record_date = #{recordDate} ORDER BY mr.scheduled_time

SELECT mr.*, d.drug_name, mp.time_slot as plan_time_slot FROM medication_record mr LEFT JOIN drug d ON mr.drug_id = d.id LEFT JOIN medication_plan mp ON mr.plan_id = mp.id WHERE mr.user_id = #{userId} AND mr.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY mr.record_date, mr.scheduled_time

SELECT mr.drug_id as drugId, d.drug_name as drugName, d.specification as specification, COUNT(*) as usageCount FROM medication_record mr LEFT JOIN drug d ON mr.drug_id = d.id WHERE mr.user_id = #{userId} AND mr.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND mr.status IN (1, 3) GROUP BY mr.drug_id, d.drug_name, d.specification ORDER BY usageCount DESC

SELECT mr.*, d.drug_name, CASE WHEN HOUR(mr.scheduled_time) BETWEEN 6 AND 11 THEN 'morning' WHEN HOUR(mr.scheduled_time) BETWEEN 12 AND 17 THEN 'afternoon' ELSE 'evening' END as time_slot FROM medication_record mr LEFT JOIN drug d ON mr.drug_id = d.id WHERE mr.user_id = #{userId} AND mr.record_date = #{recordDate} ORDER BY mr.scheduled_time

SELECT mr.*, d.drug_name, mp.time_slot as plan_time_slot FROM medication_record mr LEFT JOIN drug d ON mr.drug_id = d.id LEFT JOIN medication_plan mp ON mr.plan_id = mp.id WHERE mr.user_id = #{userId} AND mr.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND mr.status = 2 ORDER BY mr.record_date DESC, mr.scheduled_time DESC

SELECT mr.id, mr.user_id, mr.plan_id, mr.drug_id, mr.scheduled_time, mr.actual_time, mr.status, mr.is_on_time, mr.late_minutes, mr.missed_reason, mr.supplement_action, mr.remark, mr.record_date, mr.created_at, mr.updated_at FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT record_date, user_id FROM medication_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (1, 3) AND record_date <= CURDATE() ORDER BY record_date DESC LIMIT #{limitDays} ) t INNER JOIN medication_record mr ON t.user_id = mr.user_id AND t.record_date = mr.record_date ORDER BY mr.record_date
